analysis.reasoning: The tweet frames the EU as a successful, unified global actor promoting multilateralism and the UN Charter, tying 75 years of post-war cooperation to current EU leadership. This aligns with EU1 (successful story), EU2 (unity), and EU6 (contributes to a better world). It does not clearly promote EU3 (useful for citizens), EU4 (avant-garde regulatory leadership), or EU5 (global champion of fair causes beyond multilateralism).
